zh.lifeSummary: 當David Petr Yurevich於大約1170年出生在俄羅斯Владимирская ОбластьМуром時，他的父親Yurij Vladimirovich Duke Of Murom29歲，母親Mrs- Yurij Vladimirovich Duchess Murom27歲。他於1193年與Fevroniya Evrosiniya在蘇聯РоссияВладимирская ОбластьМуром結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1228年4月享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Petr Yurevich于大约1170年出生在俄罗斯Владимирская ОбластьМуром时，他的父亲Yurij Vladimirovich Duke Of Murom29岁，母亲Mrs- Yurij Vladimirovich Duchess Murom27岁。他于1193年与Fevroniya Evrosiniya在苏联РоссияВладимирская ОбластьМуром结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1228年4月享年59岁。

Murom, Vladimir Oblast, Russia, Soviet Union

nameMeanings.name: Yurevich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Boris, Vladimir, Leonid, Mikhail, Lev, Dmitry, Igor, Anatoly, Arkadiy, Yefim, Arkady, Aleksandr.  Jewish Isaak, Naum, Yakov, Isak, Hyman, Sima, Zalman.
Jewish (from Belarus and Lithuania): variant of Horowitz , originating under Russian influence, since Russian has no h and alters it to g in borrowed words and names.

variants.name: Horowitz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Gershon, Hyman, Naftali, Mayer, Baruch, Meyer, Moshe, Shlomo, Yaakov, Avram.

Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Hořovice in central Bohemia, named with a short form of a Czech personal name such as Hořimir or Hořislav. This town was a major Jewish centre in the Middle Ages.
History: This is one of the old Ashkenazic surnames. In Eastern Europe, it was used by rabbinical families well before the mass adoption of surnames by local Jews at the turn of the 19th century.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: Petr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When David Petr Yurevich was born about 1170, in murom, Vladimir Oblast, Russia, his father, Yurij Vladimirovich Duke Of Murom, was 29 and his mother, Mrs- Yurij Vladimirovich Duchess Murom, was 27. He married Fevroniya Evrosiniya in 1193, in Murom, Vladimir Oblast, Russia, Soviet Union. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in April 1228, at the age of 59.

Murom, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russia, Nõukogude Liit

Murom, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russia, Union soviétique
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Petr Yurevich est né environ 1170, à murom, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russie, son père, Yurij Vladimirovich Duke Of Murom, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mrs- Yurij Vladimirovich Duchess Murom, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Fevroniya Evrosiniya en 1193, à Murom, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russia, Union soviétique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1228, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als David Petr Yurevich um 1170 in murom, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Yurij Vladimirovich Duke Of Murom 29 und seine Mutter Mrs- Yurij Vladimirovich Duchess Murom 27. Er hat 1193 in Murom, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russia, Sowjetunion Fevroniya Evrosiniya geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im April 1228 im Alter von 59 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David Petr Yurevich è nato il circa 1170 nel murom, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russia, il suo padre, Yurij Vladimirovich Duke Of Murom, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Mrs- Yurij Vladimirovich Duchess Murom, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Fevroniya Evrosiniya nel 1193, nel Murom, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russia, Sowjetunion. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1228, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: David Petr Yurevichが約1170年にロシアВладимирская ОбластьМуромで生まれた時，父Yurij Vladimirovich Duke Of Muromは29歳，母Mrs- Yurij Vladimirovich Duchess Muromは27歳であった。1193年にソビエト連邦РоссияВладимирская ОбластьМуромでFevroniya Evrosiniyaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1228年4月に59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: David Petr Yurevich(이)가 대략 1170년 러시아 Владимирская Область Муром에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Yurij Vladimirovich Duke Of Murom(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs- Yurij Vladimirovich Duchess Murom(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1193년 소련 Россия Владимирская Область Муром에서 Fevroniya Evrosiniya(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1228년 4월 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Petr Yurevich родился около 1170 г. в местности Муром, Владимирская Область, Россия, его отцу по имени Yurij Vladimirovich Duke Of Murom было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs- Yurij Vladimirovich Duchess Murom, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Fevroniya Evrosiniya в 1193 г. в местности Муром, Владимирская Область, Россия, Советский Союз. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер апрель 1228 г. в возрасте 59 лет.
